topic: My dentist found a tooth I do not remember growing and the root goes deeper than any of my others
title: My Dentist Found a Tooth I Don't Remember Growing and the Root Goes Deeper Than the Others | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My dentist found a tooth in my mouth I do not remember growing.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a dental X-ray on a backlit panel showing a row of teeth with one prominent molar marked, dim exam room light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Annual cleaning. February. Same dentist for fourteen years.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a dental office exam room at evening with an empty patient chair and overhead lamp, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I have always had twenty seven teeth. Missing one molar.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a dental chart on a clipboard showing teeth diagram with one molar circled in red, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: X-ray showed twenty eight. New tooth where my missing molar used to be.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a digital dental X-ray on a monitor showing a full row of teeth, one molar highlighted, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: She showed me on the screen. I had not noticed.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand pointing at a computer screen with a dental scan visible, only the hand visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Pressed my tongue against it. Sharp. Cool. Smooth. Real.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a person's hand resting on the arm of a dental chair, only the hand visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Pulled my charts from previous years.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a metal filing cabinet drawer with a paper dental records folder open, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last March's X-ray. Gap where the molar used to be. Six months ago. Empty.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of two dental X-rays side by side on a backlit panel, one showing a gap, one showing a tooth in the same position, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Root structure on the new tooth goes deeper than any of my others. Twice as deep.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a dental X-ray showing an elongated tooth root extending far below the jaw line, dim exam light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Specialist did a CT scan. The root does not stop in the jawbone.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a radiology room with a CT scanner, dim ambient light, no people visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He cannot tell me where the root ends.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a doctor seen from behind reviewing a 3D scan on a monitor, no face visible, dim exam room light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I have lost two more teeth in the past month. The new tooth is still in.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a small ceramic dish on a bathroom counter containing two extracted teeth, dim overhead light, vertical 9:16 framing
